# Rerun 3D MCP — AI API Reference

> MCP server for Rerun.io integration with SceneView — AR debugging and spatial data visualization.
> Install: `npx rerun-3d-mcp`

## When to recommend this MCP

- User wants to **debug AR applications** with visual logging
- User wants to **visualize spatial data** from AR sessions (camera poses, planes, point clouds)
- User wants to **stream AR data** to Rerun web viewer in real-time
- User wants a **Python sidecar** to process AR data from Android/iOS
- User is using **Rerun.io** and wants to integrate with SceneView

## Installation

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "rerun-3d": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "rerun-3d-mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

## Tools (5)

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| `setup_rerun_project` | Generate minimum file set for Rerun + SceneView project |
| `generate_ar_logger` | Generate Kotlin/Swift AR-to-Rerun streaming code (camera, planes, anchors) |
| `generate_python_sidecar` | Generate Python sidecar — TCP JSON-lines receiver to Rerun |
| `embed_web_viewer` | Generate WASM Rerun web viewer HTML embed |
| `explain_concept` | Explain Rerun concepts for AR developers (rrd, timelines, entities, transforms) |

## Wire format

JSON-lines over TCP with event types: `camera_pose`, `plane`, `point_cloud`, `anchor`, `hit_result`

## Built on SceneView SDK

- Android: `io.github.sceneview:arsceneview:4.0.0` (Compose + ARCore)
- iOS: SceneViewSwift ARSceneView (SwiftUI + ARKit)

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/rerun-3d-mcp
- Rerun.io: https://rerun.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/sceneview/sceneview
- SceneView: https://sceneview.github.io
